name: focusflow
description: FocusFlow - Productivity Dashboard com Bootstrap 5 e Sass

scripts.sass:build: sass src/scss/style.scss public/css/style.css --no-source-map && sass src/scss/calendar.scss public/css/calendar.css --no-source-map && sass src/scss/tasks.scss public/css/tasks.css --no-source-map
scripts.build: npm run sass:build && npm run lint && npm run format

author: José
